Example Co

Frequently Asked Questions

What is Mavenn?

Mavenn is our AI-powered knowledge management platform. It automatically extracts, organizes, and connects knowledge from your existing tools so your team can find answers instantly.

How does agentic automation differ from traditional RPA?

Traditional RPA follows rigid, rule-based scripts. Agentic automation uses LLM-powered agents that can reason about context, handle exceptions, and adapt to new situations without reprogramming.

What data security measures are in place?

All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We support SSO via SAML 2.0, role-based access control, and SOC 2 Type II compliance. Customer data is never used for model training.

Can I self-host Mavenn?

Yes. Mavenn ships as a Docker image and can run on any infrastructure. We provide Helm charts for Kubernetes deployments and a single-binary option for smaller teams.

How do I get started?

Sign up for a free account at mavenn.io, connect your first data source, and Mavenn will begin indexing within minutes. No credit card required.
